payload.purpose_context: Mission B of the Common Docs split - gated on Mission A's reconciliation ADR being merged. It performs the actual move: consolidate the four doc roots into one 13-section docs/ root, migrate all 140 ADRs (incl the 20 era-less ones) into adr/<era>/ with YAML frontmatter, rewrite the ~2,190 doc-path references (src/ first), apply DocFX redirect stubs for URL continuity, rewrite docfx.json + TOCs, distil+move+redirect docs/3x (live charter content, not blind-delete), move the glossary per A's read-path mapping, and flip A's report-only rulers to blocking against the cleaned tree. Dogfoods A's governed doctrine. Folds #2054.
payload.purpose_tldr: Execute the Common Docs structural consolidation: single-root move, adr/<era>/ + 140-ADR conversion, the reference rewrites, redirect stubs, and flipping the rulers to blocking.

payload.wp_title: Redirect-stub generator + redirect map + coverage-vs-baseline + docs-pages.yml wiring
Lockfile regen → drift 0 (generated == committed) from the backfilled frontmatter
Run the 117-unique ADR conversion → docs/adr/<era>/ (drop 47 mirrors, close flat shim)
Land-first runtime-critical reads (6 reads, dual-read + resolution tests, BEFORE any move)
docfx.json globs + every toc.yml → 13-section structure; DocFX build green
Bulk reference rewrite (~2920 occ via occurrence map) + targeted-ref-updates + CHANGELOG alias refs
Flip the 3 rulers to blocking (--strict + lockfile code change) + CI wiring + full-gate dry-run (C-005)
Frontmatter backfill AUTHORING (~580 pages) — description (50–180) + related; run the backfill
Tree move — fold architecture/ (non-ADR) into docs/ per the occurrence map
Redirect baseline-URL capture (PRE-move, committed denominator for NFR-002)
Shadow-tree resolution — docs/1x+2x delete+redirect; docs/3x distil+move+redirect (C-004)
Frontmatter backfill TOOLING + the new 50–180 description length gate + related-edge derivation
